ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the channel that published the video */,
  "publish_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the video was published */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the video belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the video is popular */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the video has received */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the video has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the video has received */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the video */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the video */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the video's thumbnail image */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the video is private */,
  "is_live" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the video is a live stream */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the video */,
  "transcript_url" TEXT /* URL to the video's transcript (if available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_title" TEXT /* Title of the channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the channel was created */,
  "channel_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the channel */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the channel's profile image */,
  "subscriber_count" INTEGER /* Number of subscribers to the channel */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the channel is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_title" TEXT /* Title of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the category entails */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the category's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video being engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the video */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the engagement */,
  "view_time" INTEGER /* Duration of time the user spent on the video (in seconds) */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., view, like, comment) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for engagement (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user engaging with the video */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user engaging with the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_tags_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the playlist */,
  "playlist_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the playlist's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_videos" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video included in the playlist */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the video in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the report */,
  "report_reason" TEXT /* Reason for reporting the video */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was made */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report has been resolved */,
  "resolution_comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the resolution of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_reports_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement summary */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the videos */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video being engaged with */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views by the user */,
  "total_likes" INTEGER /* Total number of likes by the user */,
  "total_comments" INTEGER /* Total number of comments by the user */,
  "total_dislikes" INTEGER /* Total number of dislikes by the user */,
  "total_shares" INTEGER /* Total number of shares by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagements_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
